api: Yotpo Core API v3 (https://core-api.yotpo.com, per-endpoint OpenAPI descriptions fetched from https://core-api.yotpo.com/reference/*.md)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-derived from the live Yotpo Core API v3 reference (the pre-Pass-B bundle's `apidocs.yotpo.com` docs_url pointed at Yotpo's separate UGC/Reviews API reference, which does not document the products/customers/orders endpoints this bundle's 3 legacy-parity streams actually call — the real Core API v3 reference lives at core-api.yotpo.com and is the correct source of truth, now recorded as this bundle's docs_url). Every documented GET list-shaped resource is now a stream (products, product_variants, collections, customers, orders, webhook_targets, webhook_filters, webhook_subscriptions); every dialect-expressible mutation (product/variant/order/customer create+update, order-fulfillment create+update, collection create+update, collection-membership add/remove, webhook target/filter/subscription full CRUD) is a writes.json action. Excluded: single-object detail GETs that duplicate an already-covered list stream's per-item shape, the aggregated-order-info batch endpoint (a distinct legacy simplified-integration shape layered over the same order/product/fulfillment data create_order/create_order_fulfillment already cover), custom customer events (Yotpo-deprecated, scheduled for removal), and the collections-for-a-product reverse-lookup (duplicates data already reachable via the collections stream's own membership).

excluded.reason: single-product detail; identical record shape to the products list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-variant detail; identical record shape to the product_variants list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

reverse lookup of which collections a product belongs to; the same membership relationship is already discoverable via the collections stream plus this bundle's own retrieve-products-in-collection coverage, not a distinct record shape
products-in-a-collection listing; same per-product record shape the products stream already covers, filterable/joinable client-side via collection membership
Yotpo's own documentation marks this endpoint deprecated and scheduled for removal; discontinuing new use per the vendor's explicit notice
single-order detail; identical record shape to the orders list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
an order's fulfillments are already embedded in the orders stream's own per-order fulfillments[] array (passthrough projection preserves it verbatim); not modeled as a separate read stream
single-fulfillment detail; same embedded-array data the orders stream already carries per order

the 'aggregated order info' batch-registration endpoint bundles order+product+fulfillment payloads into one simplified-integration call; create_order plus create_order_fulfillment already cover the equivalent data mutations at their own native granularity
single-target detail; identical record shape to the webhook_targets list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-filter detail; identical record shape to the webhook_filters list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-subscription detail; identical record shape to the webhook_subscriptions list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

one-time store-id+api-secret to access-token exchange; a token-exchange auth flow this dialect's declarative auth candidates cannot express without a new Tier-2 AuthHook, which this pass is not authorized to add (no new hook packages) — the resulting access_token is supplied directly as this bundle's secrets.access_token instead, generated out-of-band
